title: Intensely Peppery Jamaican Sweet Potato Curry
description: A rich and aromatic lacto-vegetarian curry featuring sweet potatoes, Jamaican seasonings, and a spicy kick, perfect for a monsoon evening
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat and render the lardons until crispy
Remove the lardons from the pan and set aside
Add the chopped onion to the pan and saute until softened
Add the diced scotch bonnet peppers to the pan and saute for an additional minute
Add the curry powder to the pan and stir to combine
Add the diced sweet potatoes to the pan and stir to combine with the curry powder mixture
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 20 minutes or until the sweet potatoes are tender
Season the curry with salt and black pepper to taste
Garnish with chopped cilantro and crispy lardons
